original_snippet_context: A commentary on the impact of exchange rate fluctuations on foreign investment in Brazilian railroads and the role of coffee producers.
relevant_quote: É claro, pois, que a alta do cambio faz escorrer com grandes lucros para o exterior, capitaes que aqui se achavam immobilisados, e que podiam ser applicados no augmento do nosso agricultura, no progresso de nossa industria, ou no desenvolvimento do nosso commercio.
justification: The author criticizes the high exchange rate ('alta do cambio') for driving capital out of Brazil, hindering investment in agriculture, industry, and commerce, suggesting a preference for a more managed or stable exchange rate regime that would benefit these sectors, aligning with some expansionist views.
